holdings.infoBox: VV is an equity ETF with a total of 461 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.64%, Apple at 7.18%, Microsoft at 5.24%, Amazon.com at 4.10%, and Alphabet at 3.47%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Large-Cap ETF (VV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the CRSP US Large Cap index. The fund seeks to track a market-cap-weighted portfolio that provides large-cap exposure to the US equity space. VV was launched on Jan 27, 2004 and is issued by Vanguard.

data.title: Artificial Intelligence Ranks Schwab US Large-Cap ETF Best Smart Beta ETF
data.text: Q.ai's deep learning algorithms have identified several top US Large Cap Smart Beta ETFs based on fund flows. Diversify your portfolio and mitigate risk with these ETFs.
